description: Priority areas for near-real-time monitoring. 'areas' are the IUU-priority boxes where the on-demand Sentinel-1 SAR engine looks for dark vessels. 'ais_coverage' is the broader live-AIS display sweep (the ingest prefers it so the live map shows the whole ocean of broadcasting vessels, not just the SAR-priority boxes); it falls back to 'areas' if absent. bbox is [lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max] in WGS84 (same order as the SAR script's --bbox and the GeoJSON convention).

areas.name: Galapagos Marine Reserve and EEZ edge
Argentine shelf edge (Blue Hole, squid jigger fleet)
West Africa EEZs (Guinea, Sierra Leone, Liberia)
